mapper.select: SELECT * FROM feedback WHERE userId = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM feedback ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feedback (userId, username, content, create_time, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{content}, #{createTime}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE feedback SET status = #{status}, reply = #{reply}, reply_time = #{replyTime} WHERE id = #{id}
